creator: svysh.fbsd@gmail.com
text:
Created attachment 213651
patch to update the port

- update 3.74 -> 3.75
Changes: https://metacpan.org/changes/distribution/common-sense
- add LICENSE_FILE
- request maintainership, as Mons Anderson <mons@cpan.org>
	is absent for 9+ years, see:
https://svnweb.freebsd.org/ports/head/devel/p5-common-sense/Makefile?view=log

- "portlint -AC" gives non-relevant warns.
- Tested with:
12.1-RELEASE-p4 amd64
poudriere 3.3.4
perl 5.30.2
pkg 1.14.2
- built-in perl tests in a clean poudriere jail say PASS.
